title: Eugene Asicksik Appointed to Fill Board Vacancy
summary: BSNC is pleased to announce the appointment of Eugene Asicksik as a Director on the BSNC Board. Asicksik brings a wealth of experience, having previously served on the BSNC Board of Directors for 36 years. “We warmly welcome Eugene back to the BSNC Board of Directors,” said BSNC Chair Cindy Massie....

title: The Arctic in the 2023 Russian Foreign Policy Concept
summary: Nikita Lipunov and Pavel Devyatkin write about 2023 changes to Russia’s Arctic foreign policy and strategy. The post The Arctic in the 2023 Russian Foreign Policy Concept appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
